name: Tournament of Lust
description:
You've been selected to represent Khunjah in the Tournament Of Lust, where you'll be forced into battling a gauntlet of foes who are all trying to turn you into their whore. Pick a strategy and loadout to survive

You'll be facing against 4 opponents in 4 separate rounds. The tournament's traditions are made for the crowd's entertainment. Though victory can be achieved through traditional forms of combat, earning the crowd's favor through entertaining their lewd tastes will be sure to eternalize your name in the history books and give yourself a little edge.

Through the multitude of magic and monsters, you will have many options to prepare yourself with. Strategize and equip yourself with enchanted weapons and armor, or cast spells yourself.

Defeat means losing your pride, and earning an eternity of humiliation.
creator: Crealeddd
